title: U.S. Lifts Fertilizer Sanctions on Belarus as Iran War Causes Price Surge
summary_full: The Trump administration made the move in exchange for Belarus’s freeing of 250 political prisoners, part of a rapprochement between the two countries.
summary_public: The Trump administration made the move in exchange for Belarus’s freeing of 250 political prisoners, part of a rapprochement between the two countries.

BY.label: neutral
